description: Performs storage provisioning, mounts, packages, and host configuration for RHEL 8/9

action_type.description: Task mode: 'create_storage' (sequential flow), 'extend_lv' (LVM resize), or 'generic' (runs individual items based on passed parameters)

lv_size.description: Size for creation or extension (e.g. 5G or +2G)

do_daemon_reload.description: If true, runs systemctl daemon-reload (generic mode)

add_fstab_entry.description: If true, adds /etc/fstab entry using vg_name, lv_name, mount_path, and fstype (generic mode)

file_owner.description: Owner for mount_path or target directory/file

file_group.description: Group for mount_path or target directory/file

hosts_entry.description: Host entry line to append to /etc/hosts (e.g. '192.168.1.50 server1.example.com')
